title: Loop state record
description: Structured, lockable state for one work item in a loop, persisted outside the model context. Version fields make a mid-run change to the target detectable; state_version drives optimistic locking. Mirrors the example in loop-engineering/references/production-hardening.md.

artifact_ref.description: Pointer to the work product, e.g. worktree://repo/pr-418.

failure_fingerprint.description: Stable signature of the current failure; read by the no-progress check.

progress_metrics.description: Real progress signals the no-progress check reads (e.g. failing_tests, unmet_rubric_items).

pending_approval.description: Set when blocked at a commit gate waiting for a human.

state_version.description: Drives optimistic locking; a write that finds this has moved must re-read rather than overwrite.
